title: rosa × damascena var. officinalis
intro: Rosa × damascena var. officinalis, also known as the rose absolute or the oil of roses, is a fragrant and medicinal plant that belongs to the family Rosaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Rosa × damascena var. officinalis include reducing stress and anxiety, promoting relaxation, and improving sleep quality, as well as providing relief from menstrual cramps, digestive issues, and skin problems. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, such as essential oils, perfumes, and teas, which can be consumed or applied topically to harness its medicinal and therapeutic benefits.
